items.title: Gaza City hospitals say several killed in strike, as Israel targets Hamas leaders
items.summary: At least five children were reportedly killed in the strike, which appears to have targeted a Hamas commander.

items.title: Are US and Iran close to peace or sliding back to war?
items.summary: Neither side seems interested in a return to all-out conflict, despite the latest exchange of strikes.

items.title: Iran says it targeted American base after fresh US strikes
items.summary: The hostilities come during a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran, and protracted negotiations to end the three-month war.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 肯亞女子學校宿舍火災　釀16死79人送醫
items.summary: 東非國家肯亞一所女子學校的宿舍今天凌晨發生火災，造成16名學生不幸喪生，另有79人送醫，成為該國最新一起致命校園火災。  法新社報導，官員表示，當地時間凌晨1時前不久，納庫魯郡（Nakuru...…

items.title: 瑞士火車站持刀攻擊案3人受傷　警方定調恐攻
items.summary: 瑞士一處火車站今天發生持刀攻擊案，造成3人受傷，一名犯嫌被捕。警方表示這是一起恐怖主義行徑，犯嫌曾被檢舉散播激進組織「伊斯蘭國」（IS）的宣傳內容。  路透社報導，這起攻擊案發生在格林威治標...…

items.title: 傳美伊達成初步協議　擬延長停火60天並啟動核談判
items.summary: 美國與伊朗的戰爭已持續3個月，根據一名熟知內情的美國官員，美伊談判代表今天達成一項初步協議，將使雙方的停火延長60天，並啟動有關伊朗核計畫的談判。  美聯社報導，這名官員因未獲授權公開發言而...…
